public class

ContextWrapper

extends Context
java.lang.Object
   ↳ android.content.Context
     ↳ android.content.ContextWrapper
Known Direct Subclasses
Service
Service A slimmed-down version of Service for use in minimal Android runtime environments. 

Class Overview

A simplified version of ContextWrapper for use in minimal Android runtime environments.

This class provides a wrapper around a Context object, delegating calls to the wrapped context.

Summary

[Expand]
Inherited Constants
From class android.content.Context
String ACTIVITY_SERVICE Activity service name.
[Expand]
Inherited Fields
From class android.content.Context
public static int MODE_ENABLE_WRITE_AHEAD_LOGGING Database open flag: Enable write-ahead logging.
public static int MODE_NO_LOCALIZED_COLLATORS Database open flag: Don't localize collators.
public static int MODE_PRIVATE Shared preferences mode: Access is limited to the application itself.
public static int MODE_WORLD_READABLE Shared preferences mode: Allow all other applications to have read access.
public static int MODE_WORLD_WRITEABLE Shared preferences mode: Allow all other applications to have write access.

Return the context of the single, global Application object of the current process.

Return the Looper for the main thread of the current process.

Public Constructors

public ContextWrapper ()

Create a new context wrapper instance.

Public Methods

public Context getApplicationContext ()

Return the context of the single, global Application object of the current process.

This implementation returns a singleton instance of ContextWrapper.

Returns
Context The application context.

public AssetManager getAssets ()

Return an AssetManager instance for the application's package.

Returns
AssetManager An AssetManager instance.

public Looper getMainLooper ()

Return the Looper for the main thread of the current process.

Returns
Looper The main looper.
